resources.string: PrismSpace not ready
This work profile has not granted PrismSpace management permission. Please reconfigure it in the main space.
Error
Send files to the main space
In an app, tap “Share” → switch to the “Personal” tab → choose “Import into this space PrismSpace”
Management and settings should be done in the main space PrismSpace app.
Dual space
Want to go back to the main space? Use the system Recents or the personal / work switcher on your home screen.
Files
Move files between spaces
In any app, select the file and tap the system “Share”.
On the share panel, switch the “Personal / Work” tab and choose the target space.
Choose “Import into this space PrismSpace”.
Choose the folder to save into. Done.
The “Personal” tab = saves to the main space; the “Work” tab = saves to the dual space. Both directions use this same method.
Transfer history
Clear
Clear transfer history?
This only clears the log below — your transferred files are not deleted.
No transfers yet. Once you share a file into this space using the method above, it will appear here.
Open
Could not open it directly. Look under Download/PrismSpace in your system file manager.
Install
Couldn\'t find the copied app package in this space. Re-clone it from the main space.
Preparing to install…
Installed into the dual space.
Install failed: %1$s
Allow PrismSpace to install unknown apps, then tap Install again.
Allow this file app to install unknown apps, then return to PrismSpace and open the APK again.
This system file app cannot be authorized for APK install. Tap Install here to continue with PrismSpace.
